title: Bubble Gun Kids Dinosaur Bubble Blower Toy, Friction Powered, Non Toxic, Green/Yellow, Unisex, Ages Baby and Up, BUBBLE_MAKER
features: KIDS BUBBLES FUN - Blow zillions of safe, non toxic bubbles for kids. Hours of fun and play both indoors and outdoors with this dinosaur toy bubble gun!
NO BATTERIES REQUIRED - This friction powered bubble toy requires no batteries! You can have hours of fun without stopping!
EASY TO USE - simply dip the bubble blower in the solution and pull the trigger. Easy to clean and store! Simply wipe the bubble guns clean with a tissue or damp cloth.

COLLECT THEM ALL - Collect all the different animals in the Bubble Gun range. The range includes: - Clown Fish - Dinosaur - Dolphin - Duck - Elephant - Frog - Shark. Find your favourite or collect the whole set!
BUY WITH CONFIDENCE - Deluxebase has specialised in designing fun and educational toys and gifts for kids in the UK, US and Europe for more than 25 years.
description: Product description This bubble gun for kids is a cool dinosaur toy. Blow zillions of safe, non toxic bubbles for kids using friction power so no batteries are required! It is very easy to use. Just dip the bubble blower in the solution and pull the trigger. Great for indoor or outdoor play and it is easy to clean and store! A perfect party gift or Christmas stocking filler. Find your favourite bubble blower or collect the whole bubble gun set! The collection includes: - Clown Fish - Dinosaur - Dolphin - Duck - Elephant - Frog - Shark Indications Entertaining children, creating a festive atmosphere at parties or events, encouraging active play and creativity Directions Dip the bubble gun in the solution and squeeze the trigger to blow bubbles.
